summary: Iteration 69 - DataTable Hook & Enrollment Auto-Skip Testing. Tested 2 major feature batches: (1) Global DataTable hook with search, sort, pagination across 16 CMS managers, (2) Enrollment bulk toggle and auto-skip functionality. All features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 69 tested DataTable hook and Enrollment auto-skip features. All 16 CMS managers now have search, sort, pagination via useDataTable hook. EnrollmentFieldsManager has bulk toggle buttons (Show All/Hide All) per step. Public enrollment flow auto-skips steps with all fields hidden. All enrollment fields have been RESTORED to visible state.

useDataTable_hook.details: Reusable hook at /app/frontend/src/components/admin/useDataTable.js exports useDataTable, DataTableToolbar, DataTablePagination, SortableTh

members_datatable.details: MembersManager has search (data-testid=members-search-input), page-size (members-page-size with 10/25/50/100), sortable headers (th-first_name, th-email, th-created_at, th-membership_id), pagination (members-pagination)

members_search.details: Searching 'carlos' filters to 1 of 29 members, clearing search shows all 29

members_sort.details: Clicking email header toggles asc/desc sort, arrow indicator updates

members_pagination.details: Page size 10 shows pagination with Next/First buttons working

localstorage_persistence.details: Page size persisted in localStorage (key dt:members:pageSize), survives page refresh

empty_search_state.details: 'No members match your search' message displayed for non-matching search

contacts_datatable.details: ContactsManager has search, page-size, count (8 total)

blog_datatable.details: BlogManager has search, page-size, count (3 total)

services_datatable.details: ServicesManager has search, page-size, count (7 total)

users_datatable.details: UsersManager has search, page-size, count (3 total)

hero_datatable.details: HeroManager has search, page-size, count (5 total)

portfolio_datatable.details: PortfolioManager has search, page-size, count (6 total)

pages_datatable.details: PagesManager has search, page-size, count (29 total)

member_types_datatable.details: MemberTypesManager has search, page-size, count (2 total)

books_datatable.details: BooksManager has search, page-size, count (3 total)

purchases_datatable.details: PurchasesManager has search, page-size, count (21 total)

landing_contacts_datatable.details: LandingContactsManager has search, page-size, count (6 total)

landing_subscribers_datatable.details: LandingSubscribersManager has search, page-size, count (8 total)

maps_datatable.details: MapsManager (Locations tab) has search, page-size, count (8 total)

bundles_datatable.details: AdminBundlesManager has search, page-size, count (5 total)

coupons_datatable.details: AdminCouponsManager has search, page-size, count (1 total)

enrollment_bulk_toggle.details: Each step has bulk toggle button (step-1-bulk-toggle through step-4-bulk-toggle). Clicking 'Show All' shows all fields, button changes to 'Hide All'

enrollment_visible_badge.details: Each step header shows 'X/Y visible' badge

enrollment_skipped_label.details: When all fields in a step are hidden, amber 'SKIPPED ON PUBLIC FLOW' label appears

enrollment_auto_skip.details: Public /membership-enrollment auto-skips empty steps. With steps 2&3 hidden: stepper shows only 2 steps (1 and 4 renumbered as 1 and 2), title shows 'Step 1 of 2', progress bar advances 50% per step

enrollment_4_step_regression.details: After restoring all fields, public flow shows all 4 steps correctly: 'Step 1 of 4', all four steps in stepper

enrollment_fields_restored.details: All enrollment fields visibility restored to true for all 4 steps
